name: Cocoa Rice Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cooked rice, cocoa, sugar replacement, vanilla, and egg yolks in a mixing bowl. Stir to blend completely.
2. Beat egg whites with salt and cream of tartar until stiff peaks form.
3. Gently fold the egg whites into the cocoa mixture.
4. Pour the pudding into a greased 1-quart baking dish.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 15 or 20 minutes, or until set.
